title: cacalia haenkeana
intro: Cacalia haenkeana, also known as Haenke's Cacalia or Cacalia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cacalia haenkeana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Cacalia haenkeana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
